'''''Stendaff''''' was a [[Sacheen-class light escort|''Sacheen''-class light escort]] vessel that served in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. The [[Warship/Legends|warship]] was a part of [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]]'s task force stationed at [[Gmar Askilon]], following the departure of the ''[[Teljkon Vagabond]]'' into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
